title: 2Pcs Floral Foam Blocks (9.0" L x 4.13" W x 2.75" H) Dry Flower Foam for Flower Arrangements Florist Supplies for Arts, Crafts & Weddings(Grey)
features: Premium Quality: crafted from premium materials, our floral foam guarantees superior performance and reliability. Whether you're a professional florist or a DIY enthusiast, trust in our product to deliver consistent results that exceed your expectations.

Dry Floral Foam for Artificial Flowers: our dry use floral foam offers stability for arranging artificial flowers. Whether you're creating centerpieces, bouquets, or decorative displays, this foam provides a sturdy base, ensuring your arrangements stay intact and upright.

Wide Application: Whether you're creating stunning centerpieces, bouquets, or decorative displays, this floral foam offers versatility to accommodate various shapes and sizes of arrangements with ease.
